description: Genomics platform for managing, analyzing, and visualizing sequencing data. Includes CLI SDK, REST API, and MCP server for AI-assisted workflows.
rules: Filter queries with Django-style syntax: status='SUCCEEDED', application__name='MUTECT'
Data model hierarchy: Individual -> Sample -> Experiment -> Analysis
Analysis statuses: CREATED -> STAGED -> SUBMITTED -> STARTED -> SUCCEEDED / FAILED
Use system_id for experiments/individuals/samples, pk for analyses/projects/applications
